tagline: Self-serve post-purchase order edits for Shopify

benefits.label: Support ticket deflection
benefits.description: When customers can edit their own orders, they stop emailing support about it.

editTicketRate.label: % of orders that generate an edit-related ticket

reductionRate.label: Ticket reduction from self-serve editing
reductionRate.source: dtcmvp estimate (partner claims up to 98%, Oh Polly case study)

benefits.label: Post-purchase upsell revenue
benefits.description: The editing flow surfaces add-on items — a net-new revenue stream.

upsellRate.label: % of orders that convert an upsell
upsellRate.source: dtcmvp estimate (partner cites Origin USA $22k/2mo, David Protein ~$1k/day)

upsellPctOfAov.label: Upsell value as % of AOV
upsellPctOfAov.source: dtcmvp estimate (typical add-on is ~40% of original cart)

sources: Oh Polly case study: 98% reduction in order-change enquiries (2,000 to 40/month)
Origin USA: $22,000 upsell revenue in 2 months
David Protein: ~$1,000/day attributed to Order Editing
notes: Site does not mention return prevention or processing-fee recovery. Those benefits may exist but are not publicly supported — omitted from this SWAG. Pricing not visible on site (hidden behind demo booking).
